summary: Complete backend testing for OCR API system using Gemini 3 Flash Vision. All 31 pytest tests passed (100% success rate). OCR extraction is working correctly with high confidence scores. All endpoints functioning as expected.

minor.issue: Returns 422 instead of 401 when X-API-Key header is completely missing (FastAPI default behavior)
minor.note: This is expected FastAPI behavior for missing required headers

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing was not requested for this iteration

passed_tests: Playground OCR extraction for PAN card
Playground OCR extraction for Aadhaar card
Playground OCR extraction for Driving License
Playground OCR auto document type detection
Public API OCR extraction with API key (/api/v1/extract)
critical_code_review_comments: MongoDB URL has default fallback value (line 28-30 in server.py) - recommend removing defaults to fail fast if env vars missing
JWT secret has fallback value (line 33) - security risk if env var not set
seed_data_creation: Test users created with pattern TEST_* prefix during testing, API keys created with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs are fully functional. OCR extraction using Gemini 3 Flash Vision is working correctly. All authentication, API key management, and analytics endpoints tested and passing. Test images should be generated with real visual content (not blank/solid color images) as per /app/image_testing.md guidelines. pytest test file at /app/backend/tests/test_ocr_api.py can be reused for regression testing.
